from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    if not triples:
        return ""
    # Group triples by subject to allow multiple entities
    from collections import defaultdict
    subject_map = defaultdict(list)
    for t in triples:
        subject_map[t.subject].append(t)

    # Simple predicate → phrase templates
    templates = {
        # Airport‑specific predicates
        "cityServed": "serves {obj}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": "is {obj} metres above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": "is {obj} metres above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": "is {obj} feet above sea level",
        # more natural phrasing without redundant unit words
        "runwayLength": "has a runway length of {obj}",
        "runwayName": "runway name is {obj}",
        "location": "is located in {obj}",
        "operatingOrganisation": "is operated by {obj}",
        "country": "is in {obj}",
        "isPartOf": "is part of {obj}",
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": "ICAO code is {obj}",
        "locationIdentifier": "location identifier is {obj}",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": "IATA code is {obj}",
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": "has a first runway length of {obj} feet",
        "1stRunwayLengthMetre": "has a first runway length of {obj} metres",
        "1stRunwaySurfaceType": "first runway surface is {obj}",
        "1stRunwayNumber": "first runway number is {obj}",
        "runwaySurfaceType": "runway surface is {obj}",
        # Generic entity predicates
        "leader": "leader is {obj}",
        "capital": "capital is {obj}",
        "language": "language is {obj}",
        "officialLanguage": "official language is {obj}",
        "currency": "currency is {obj}",
        "owner": "owner is {obj}",
        "foundingYear": "was founded in {obj}",
        "founder": "was founded by {obj}",
        "postalCode": "postal code is {obj}",
        "areaCode": "area code is {obj}",
        "largestCity": "largest city is {obj}",
        "countySeat": "county seat is {obj}",
        "mayor": "mayor is {obj}",
        "leaderParty": "leader party is {obj}",
        "leaderTitle": "leader title is {obj}",
        "chief": "chief is {obj}",
        "hubAirport": "hub airport is {obj}",
        "regionServed": "serves region {obj}",
        "nativeName": "native name is {obj}",
        "jurisdiction": "has jurisdiction in {obj}",
        # Biological classification predicates
        "class": "class is {obj}",
        "division": "division is {obj}",
        "order": "order is {obj}",
        "species": "species is {obj}",
        "demonym": "demonym is {obj}",
    }

    # Generate a separate fluent sentence for each triple.
    # This approach yields more predictable BLEU‑compatible phrasing.
    sentences = []
    for t in triples:
        subj = t.subject
        pred = t.predicate
        obj = t.object.strip('"')
        # Specific, high‑quality phrasing for common predicates
        if pred == "runwayLength":
            sentence = f"The runway length of {subj} is {obj} metres."
        elif pred == "locationIdentifier":
            sentence = f"The location identifier for {subj} is {obj}."
        elif pred == "icaoLocationIdentifier":
            sentence = f"The ICAO code for {subj} is {obj}."
        elif pred == "iataLocationIdentifier":
            sentence = f"The IATA code for {subj} is {obj}."
        elif pred == "cityServed":
            sentence = f"{subj} serves the city of {obj}."
        elif pred == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel":
            sentence = f"{subj} is {obj} metres above sea level."
        elif pred == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet":
            sentence = f"{subj} is {obj} feet above sea level."
        elif pred == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres":
            sentence = f"{subj} is {obj} metres above sea level."
        elif pred == "country":
            sentence = f"{subj} is in {obj}."
        elif pred == "isPartOf":
            sentence = f"{subj} is part of {obj}."
        elif pred == "location":
            sentence = f"{subj} is located in {obj}."
        elif pred == "operatingOrganisation":
            sentence = f"{subj} is operated by {obj}."
        elif pred == "runwayName":
            sentence = f"The runway name of {subj} is {obj}."
        elif pred == "runwaySurfaceType":
            sentence = f"The runway surface of {subj} is {obj}."
        elif pred == "1stRunwayLengthFeet":
            sentence = f"The first runway length of {subj} is {obj} feet."
        elif pred == "1stRunwayLengthMetre":
            sentence = f"The first runway length of {subj} is {obj} metres."
        elif pred == "1stRunwaySurfaceType":
            sentence = f"The first runway surface of {subj} is {obj}."
        elif pred == "1stRunwayNumber":
            sentence = f"The first runway number of {subj} is {obj}."
        else:
            # Generic fallback for any other predicate
            pred_readable = pred.replace('_', ' ')
            sentence = f"The {pred_readable} of {subj} is {obj}."
        sentences.append(sentence)

    return " ".join(sentences)

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END

        # more natural phrasing without redundant unit words
        "runwayLength": "has a runway length of {obj}",

        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": "has a first runway length of {obj} feet",
        "1stRunwayLengthMetre": "has a first runway length of {obj} metres",
        "1stRunwaySurfaceType": "first runway surface is {obj}",
        "1stRunwayNumber": "first runway number is {obj}",
        "runwaySurfaceType": "runway surface is {obj}",
        # Generic entity predicates
        "leader": "leader is {obj}",
        "capital": "capital is {obj}",
        "language": "language is {obj}",
        "officialLanguage": "official language is {obj}",
        "currency": "currency is {obj}",
        "owner": "owner is {obj}",
        "foundingYear": "was founded in {obj}",
        "founder": "was founded by {obj}",
        "postalCode": "postal code is {obj}",
        "areaCode": "area code is {obj}",
        "largestCity": "largest city is {obj}",
        "countySeat": "county seat is {obj}",
        "mayor": "mayor is {obj}",
        "leaderParty": "leader party is {obj}",
        "leaderTitle": "leader title is {obj}",
        "chief": "chief is {obj}",
        "hubAirport": "hub airport is {obj}",
        "regionServed": "serves region {obj}",
        "nativeName": "native name is {obj}",
        "jurisdiction": "has jurisdiction in {obj}",
        # Biological classification predicates
        "class": "class is {obj}",
        "division": "division is {obj}",
        "order": "order is {obj}",
        "species": "species is {obj}",
        "demonym": "demonym is {obj}",
    }

    sentences = []
    for subject, tlist in subject_map.items():
        parts = []
        for t in tlist:
            tmpl = templates.get(t.predicate)
            if tmpl:
                # Strip surrounding quotes from objects if present
                obj = t.object.strip('"')
                parts.append(tmpl.format(obj=obj))
            else:
                # Fallback generic phrase
                pred = t.predicate.replace('_', ' ')
                obj = t.object.strip('"')
                parts.append(f"{pred} {obj}")
        # Combine parts into a fluent sentence
        if parts:
            if len(parts) == 1:
                sentence = f"{subject} {parts[0]}."
            else:
                sentence = f"{subject} " + ", ".join(parts[:-1]) + ", and " + parts[-1] + "."
            sentences.append(sentence)

    return " ".join(sentences)
